title: Family Time Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The woman who has you as her child and cares for you.
rounds.explanation: mother: The woman who has you as her child and cares for you.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Small dry food we eat in a bowl with milk.
rounds.explanation: cereal: Small dry food we eat in a bowl with milk.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The number 5. It is how many fingers are on one hand.
rounds.explanation: five: The number 5. It is how many fingers are on one hand.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Another word for mother that we use at home.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A white drink that comes from cows and goats.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The number 6. It comes after five and before seven.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
Build the complete model sentence.
Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: I eat cereal with cold milk.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Which word completes the sentence: He ___ my brother.
rounds.explanation: We say he is for one person; are is for more than one and am only goes with I.

rounds.prompt: Which sentence about counting your family is written correctly?
choices: There are four person in my family.
There is four people in my family.
There four people in my family.
There are four people in my family.
rounds.answer: There are four people in my family.
rounds.explanation: For more than one we say there are and people; there is and person are for only one.

rounds.prompt: Which one is a question you can ask your friend?
rounds.explanation: Only this one asks something and ends with a question mark; the others just tell us things.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: What is the name of Amal's baby brother?
choices: She laid the table with five bowls
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Idris

rounds.prompt: What did Amal do to help before everyone sat down?
choices: She laid the table with five bowls
rounds.answer: She laid the table with five bowls
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: She laid the table with five bowls

rounds.prompt: Why did everyone laugh at baby Idris?
choices: Because his cereal went on his nose
rounds.answer: Because his cereal went on his nose
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Because his cereal went on his nose

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1 - Listen and point
rounds.target: Point to people in your family photo as an adult names them, then name them yourself.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3 - Ask and answer
rounds.target: and answer about the girls in your family.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5 - Role-play
rounds.target: Count the people at your table and tell someone.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: I eat strawberries with my cereal.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: I have five fingers on my hand.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: My father goes to work early.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'fruit' mean in this unit?
choices: Sweet food that grows on trees and plants, like apples.
The woman who has you as her child and cares for you.
Another word for father that we use at home.
rounds.answer: Sweet food that grows on trees and plants, like apples.
rounds.explanation: fruit: Sweet food that grows on trees and plants, like apples.

rounds.prompt: What does 'nine' mean in this unit?
choices: The woman who has you as her child and cares for you.
Another word for father that we use at home.
The number 9. It comes after eight and before ten.
rounds.answer: The number 9. It comes after eight and before ten.
rounds.explanation: nine: The number 9. It comes after eight and before ten.

rounds.prompt: What does 'dad' mean in this unit?
choices: The mother of your mum or your dad.
Another word for father that we use at home.
The woman who has you as her child and cares for you.
rounds.answer: Another word for father that we use at home.
rounds.explanation: dad: Another word for father that we use at home.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'two'?
rounds.explanation: two is used as a number in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'talk'?
rounds.explanation: talk is used as a verb in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'grown-ups'?
rounds.explanation: grown-ups is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: The man who has you as his child and cares for you.
The mother of your mum or your dad.
People who are big, like mums, dads and teachers.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: Long thin strips of food that we cook and eat.
Small round fruits that grow together in a bunch.
The number 3. It comes after two and before four.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: The number 7. It comes after six and before eight.
To do a job that needs care and effort.
To make a happy sound when something is funny.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: Samira is a girl. Which sentence about her is correct?
rounds.explanation: We say she for a girl; he is for a boy, it is for a thing, and they is does not match.

rounds.prompt: Which word means the same as mum?
rounds.explanation: Mum and mother are two words for the same person; a sister, grandpa and brother are different people.

rounds.prompt: Aisha shows a photo of her father. Which sentence should she say?
rounds.explanation: The photo shows her father, so only this sentence tells the truth about the picture.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: Which word names a person in your family?
rounds.explanation: A grandma is a family member; a pencil, rain and a bus are not people at all.

rounds.prompt: What do we call your mother's mother?
rounds.explanation: Your mother's mother is your grandma; a sister is a girl your own age in your family, and a teacher and neighbour are not family.

rounds.prompt: Yusuf is a boy in Aisha's family. Which word tells us who he is?
rounds.explanation: A boy in your family is your brother; sister, mother and grandma are all girls or women.
